steps.title: Draw the axis
steps.description: Lightly sketch a single line for the leaf's main vein. This is the spine the whole leaf will balance around.

steps.title: Block the outline
steps.description: Sketch a pointed oval shape around the axis — wider in the middle, narrowing to a point at each end. Try to keep both sides about equal.

steps.title: Refine the edge
steps.description: Outline the leaf with a confident stroke. Add small bumps or a few gentle waves to the edge — perfectly smooth leaves look fake.

steps.title: Trace the central vein
steps.description: Draw a firm line down the middle along your original axis. This is the strongest line on the leaf.

steps.title: Add side veins
steps.description: Add 4–6 thinner curved lines branching out from the central vein toward the edges. They should curve gently outward, not meet the edge straight on.
